properties.description: EarthCARE ACM-CAP profile variables joined to MSI neural-network scene labels and summarized to 128 km scene scale over four stratocumulus regions.

links.title: EarthCARE Marine Stratocumulus Organization and Transition Dataset
EarthCARE Marine Stratocumulus Organization and Transition Dataset

data.title: EarthCARE ACM-CAP scene properties joined to MSI neural-network cloud morphology labels

acmcap_cloud_fraction.description: ACM-CAP along-track cloud fraction of low clouds (CTH < 3km) in the scene.

attrs.description: ACM-CAP along-track cloud fraction of low clouds (CTH < 3km) in the scene.

cat_name.description: CNN mesoscale cloud morphology class name

attrs.long_name: CNN mesoscale cloud morphology class name

attrs.flag_meanings: solid_stratus closed_mcc open_mcc disorganized_mcc clustered_cu suppressed_cu

cbh_m_std.description: Standard deviation of cloud base height

attrs.long_name: Standard deviation of cloud base height

cth_all_clouds.description: In contrast to all other ACM-CAP derived variables in this dataset, which are derived from low-level clouds (CTH < 3km), this variable is derived from all cloud layers, and represents the cloud top height of the highest cloud layer in the scene.

attrs.long_name: Cloud top height of highest cloud layer
attrs.description: In contrast to all other ACM-CAP derived variables in this dataset, which are derived from low-level clouds (CTH < 3km), this variable is derived from all cloud layers, and represents the cloud top height of the highest cloud layer in the scene.

cth_m_std.description: Standard deviation of cloud top height

attrs.long_name: Standard deviation of cloud top height

attrs.description: std(cloud_water_path)/mean(cloud_water_path)

ER.description: Reduction from ACM-CAP 2D profiles to 1D along-track variable is done by taking the mean over cloudy gates for each vertical profile. The mean of this 1D along-track ER is then taken over the scene. Non-cloudy profiles are ignored.

ER_passive_perspective.description: Liquid effective radius computed as (3/2) * LWP / (density_liquid * optical_depth)

attrs.long_name: Liquid effective radius computed as (3/2) * LWP / (density_liquid * optical_depth)

ice_flag.description: Relative frequency of pixels contaminated by ice clouds (defined as TIR2 < 273 K) in the scene.

attrs.description: Relative frequency of pixels contaminated by ice clouds (defined as TIR2 < 273 K) in the scene.

lat_max.description: Maximum latitude of the scene along the nadir track.

attrs.description: Maximum latitude of the scene along the nadir track.

lat_min.description: Minimum latitude of the scene along the nadir track.

attrs.description: Minimum latitude of the scene along the nadir track.

attrs.definition:
0: None
1: Detected
2: In rain
3: In ice

lwp.description: Reduction from ACM-CAP 2D profiles to 1D along-track LWP is done by summing over liquid water content for each vertical profile. The mean of this 1D along-track LWP is then taken over the scene. Profiles without low-level clouds are ignored.

rain_rate_max.description: The maximum rain rate is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate profiles. The mean of this 1D along-track maximum rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.description: The maximum rain rate is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate profiles. The mean of this 1D along-track maximum rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rain_rate_mean.description: The mean rain rate is computed per profile from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate variable. The mean of this 1D along-track mean rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.description: The mean rain rate is computed per profile from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate variable. The mean of this 1D along-track mean rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rain_rate_subcloud.description: The subcloud rain rate is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate profiles by averaging the rain rate below the cloud base height per profile. The mean of this 1D along-track subcloud rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

attrs.description: The subcloud rain rate is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate profiles by averaging the rain rate below the cloud base height per profile. The mean of this 1D along-track subcloud rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rain_rate_surface.description: The surface rain rate is defined as the rain rate at JSG_height=235 from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate profiles. The mean of this 1D along-track surface rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored. Warning: the rain rate is not very reliable close to the surface

attrs.description: The surface rain rate is defined as the rain rate at JSG_height=235 from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_rate profiles. The mean of this 1D along-track surface rain rate is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored. Warning: the rain rate is not very reliable close to the surface

rwc_cbh.description: The rain water content at cloud base height is extracted from the ACM-CAP 2D rain_water_content profiles. The mean of this 1D along-track rain water content at cloud base is then taken over the scene. Non-rainy profiles are ignored.

rwp.description: Reduction from ACM-CAP 2D profiles to 1D along-track RWP is done by summing over rain water content for each vertical profile. The mean of this 1D along-track RWP is then taken over the scene. Non-cloudy profiles are ignored (non-raining but cloudy profiles are taken into account for the average).

attrs.description: Reduction from ACM-CAP 2D profiles to 1D along-track RWP is done by summing over rain water content for each vertical profile. The mean of this 1D along-track RWP is then taken over the scene. Non-cloudy profiles are ignored (non-raining but cloudy profiles are taken into account for the average).

The median of this 1D along-track RWP is then taken over the scene. Non-cloudy profiles are ignored (non-raining but cloudy profiles are taken into account for the average).

The 5th percentile of this 1D along-track RWP is then taken over the scene. Non-cloudy profiles are ignored (non-raining but cloudy profiles are taken into account for the average).
